name: Brex
hq: San Francisco, CA (distributed/remote; registered in San Francisco)
one_liner: Brex provides AI-powered corporate cards, business banking, expense management, bill pay, and travel software for startups and enterprises.

ambiguities: Brex was acquired by Capital One on April 7, 2026 for ~$5.15B per PitchBook/Crunchbase; it now operates as a subsidiary. Stage set to 'subsidiary'.
Total raised varies by source: PitchBook reports $1.67B (equity + debt), Tracxn reports $1.2B (equity only), Crunchbase aligns with ~$1.67B including debt. Used PitchBook figure of $1.67B.
HQ is formally listed as San Francisco by most sources, though PitchBook/Tracxn note Salt Lake City/Draper operational addresses; company went remote/distributed in 2021.
Headcount estimates range from ~1,133 (Unify, Oct 2025) to ~1,859 (Revelio, Sep 2025) to ~1,806 (Tracxn, Apr 2026); used Tracxn's most recent April 2026 figure.
Tech stack sourced from job postings (React, GraphQL, Kotlin) and LeadIQ/Crunchbase signals (Amazon Connect, OAuth, Heap); not from an official engineering blog post.
